leads.job_title: Full-Time SEO Specialist (Local SEO, GMB & Lead Gen)
leads.email_subject: GEOPRO — Saw your Local SEO Specialist listing
leads.email_body:
Hi,

GEOPRO — saw your post for a full-time SEO specialist to rank your home-service brands organically, in the Map Pack, and for GEO/AEO, plus build new lead-gen sites. I put together a page showing how I'd approach that as a packaged engagement across your whole portfolio instead of a single full-time hire:
https://organic-theory.vercel.app/leads/funnels/2026-07-15-seo-specialist-atlanta-home-service.html

More at https://organic-theory.vercel.app

Gabriel Balenton | Organic Theory Founder
